rulings.Case Title: JEFFERSON CHRISMAN VS. HOWARD LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion By Defendants And Cross-Complainants For Leave To Assert Eleventh Cause Of Action For Rescission Of November 2014 Residential Lease Agreement In Third Amended Cross-Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Rey S. Yang In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT MAY LEE, HOWARD LEE Motion By Defendants And Cross-Complainants For Leave To Assert Eleventh Cause Of Action For Rescission Of November 2014 Residential Lease Agreement In Third Amended Cross-Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Rey S. Yang In Support Thereof DENIED without prejudice. Defendants/Cross-Complainants' Motion does not comply with CRC Rule 3.1324(a)(3) and (b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MUHAMMAD SHAHZAD KHAN VS. NIKOLAOS MASTROKYRIAKOS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants Nikolaos Mastrokyriakos And Ana Mastrokyriakos For Leave To File First Amended Answer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANTS NIKOLAOS MASTROKYRIAKOS, ANA MASTROKYRIAKOS' Motion Of Defendants Nikolaos Mastrokyriakos And Ana Mastrokyriakos For Leave To File First Amended Answer To Complaint GRANTED. Defendants shall file and serve the First Amended Answer to Complaint (as attached in Exhibit A of Defendants' Supplemental Declaration in Support of the Motion).= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. WALTER JAMES CIASTON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT WALTER CIASTON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Allegations in the complaint, as well as exhibits provided, are taken as true for the purposes of ruling on the demurrer= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GUILLERMO SEGURA VS. MARIO PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF GUILLERMO SEGURA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED subject to opposition and showing that the matter is not stayed per Defendant Reynalda Rojas's bankruptcy.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. DONNA FRYE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 29, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT DONNA FRYE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED subject to (1) Defendant posting $550 with the Court no later than 4:00 pm on November 29, 2018 (2) Defendant filing her answer no later than November 29, 2018 at 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)
